title: Blobs, Borders, Blur, Spotlight & Ghost
description: Gooey blob morphing, animated gradient borders, blur-stagger text reveal, spotlight card hover, and ghost autocomplete input.

drops.title: Gooey Blob Morphing
drops.description: Three organic SVG blobs morph and wander using noise-driven control points, connected by a Catmull-Rom spline with a goo filter.
drops.concept: Each blob has 8 control points whose radii are modulated by seeded value noise over time. A Catmull-Rom-to-Bézier conversion produces smooth closed paths. An SVG feGaussianBlur + feColorMatrix filter creates the gooey merge effect when blobs overlap. Speed, size, and wobble are tunable.
drops.source: George Doe — Build a Smooth Animated Blob Using SVG + JS (dev.to)

interaction.touch: Panel hidden on mobile — blobs animate automatically

drops.title: Animated Gradient Border Cards
drops.description: Cards with a rotating conic-gradient border using CSS @property to register an animatable angle — no JavaScript needed.
drops.concept: The CSS @property rule registers --angle as a proper <angle> type, which lets the browser interpolate it. A conic-gradient is applied to border-box while a solid background covers padding-box, creating a gradient-only border. Each card uses a different duration, color palette, and starting angle for variety.
drops.source: Cruip — Animated Gradient Borders with Tailwind CSS

interaction.click: Adjust border-width, speed, and glow via sliders

drops.title: Blur-Stagger Text Reveal
drops.description: Words enter from blur + translateY + opacity with staggered CSS animation delays, triggered as each section enters the viewport.
drops.concept: Each word is wrapped in a span. The CSS animation transitions filter:blur, opacity, and translateY from their 'hidden' state to natural. animation-play-state is toggled from paused to running by IntersectionObserver when the section scrolls into view. Stagger is achieved with --d custom properties. Blur amount, stagger gap, and duration are all runtime-tunable.
drops.source: Codrops — Scroll Blur Typography + Aceternity UI blur fade-in

interaction.touch: Scroll to trigger — panel hidden on mobile

drops.title: Spotlight Card Hover
drops.description: A radial gradient spotlight follows the mouse inside each card using CSS custom properties updated by a single mousemove listener.
drops.concept: getBoundingClientRect() converts page coordinates to card-local coordinates. These are stored in CSS custom properties --mx and --my on each card element. The card's ::before pseudo-element renders a radial-gradient centred at those coordinates. --op fades the spotlight in on hover and out on leave. This pattern is zero-reflow because only custom property values change.

interaction.mouse: Move over any card to see the spotlight follow
interaction.click: Theme buttons change the spotlight colour
interaction.touch: Touch shows spotlight at touch point, fades after 600ms

drops.title: Ghost Autocomplete Input
drops.description: Code editor inputs with inline ghost text — Tab accepts, Esc dismisses, ↑/↓ cycles through matches. The AI-native IDE pattern in vanilla JS.
drops.concept: A transparent div (ghost-text layer) is positioned exactly behind the input. As the user types, the JS matches against a suggestion dictionary and writes the full suggestion into the ghost div — only the part after the cursor is visible (same color as the background, offset by input length). Tab replaces the input value with the accepted suggestion. Arrow keys cycle through multiple matches.
drops.source: GitHub Copilot inline completion UX / VS Code IntelliSense

interaction.mouse: Click chips to prefill the first input
